content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-6-max

## Summary

Thorough review of sync/import safety rules implementation. Changes span br_health.rs (new health check module), br_process.rs (sync_import, sync_if_dirty, ensure_synced with pending mutation journal and repo-wide locking), milestone_record/service.rs (pre-mutation health gates), success_reconciliation.rs (pre-close/sync health gates and planned-elsewhere comment safety), and cli/project.rs (claim_bead_in_br crash recovery with recovered flush short-circuit). The implementation is well-designed: health checks are defensive-in-depth with TOCTOU acknowledged by design, the pending mutation journal enables crash recovery across adapter restarts, repo-wide flock serializes mutation/flush/import decisions, and the break-vs-continue choice in planned-elsewhere verification correctly stops all mutations when state is unhealthy. Test coverage is comprehensive with edge cases for conflict markers inside JSON values, empty files, malformed JSONL, IO errors, recovered flush short-circuiting, legacy marker backward compatibility, concurrent mutation serialization, and git-ignored transient artifacts. No bugs, safety problems, or significant maintainability risks found.

## Amendments

None.
